title: Housing
doc_html:
§3399.24. Housing

            In order to ensure that current and former homeless and foster youth have access to stable housing, a public postsecondary education institution that offers student housing may develop a plan to provide that these students have access to housing resources as needed during and between academic terms. The plan may grant them first priority for housing placement and provide that they be placed in the institution's housing facility that remains open for occupation during the most days in a calendar year.

            Acts 2016, No. 306, §1.
doc_text:
§3399.24.  Housing
In order to ensure that current and former homeless and foster youth have access to
stable housing, a public postsecondary education institution that offers student housing may
develop a plan to provide that these students have access to housing resources as needed
during and between academic terms.  The plan may grant them first priority for housing
placement and provide that they be placed in the institution's housing facility that remains
open for occupation during the most days in a calendar year.
Acts 2016, No. 306, §1.
